title: Predict Real Box Dimensions
summary: Build and verify css box model in overflowing survey card dimension incident through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css box model from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css box model without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the overflowing survey card dimension incident case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves css box model when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: overflowing survey card dimension incident.
steps.why: Predict Real Box Dimensions makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in overflowing survey card dimension incident.

content.text: Every box has content, padding, border, and margin. With content-box, declared width applies to content and padding plus border add to the outer size. With border-box, declared width includes content, padding, and border. Vertical margins between block boxes may collapse in normal flow, while padding and borders do not. DevTools box-model evidence should match a written calculation. Apply it to overflowing survey card dimension incident.
